description: Cross-system persistent tombstone storage for characters who have met their end. Tracks provenance, cause, and legacy across all supported game systems.

name.description: The character's name as it appeared in play.

system.description: system_id of the game system this character belonged to.

level_or_tier.description: Character level (D&D-style) or advancement tier (FITD-style) at time of death.

cause_of_death.description: Narrative description of the final scene or killing blow.

date.description: ISO 8601 date string of when the character died (real-world session date).

achievements.description: List of notable deeds, completed quests, or legacy moments from this character's run.

example_tombstone.name: Ser Aldric Vane
example_tombstone.cause_of_death: Crushed by the Doomclock's final toll when the vault collapsed.
achievements: Sacrificed herself so the party could escape
